phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle view is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a vista do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH VEESH-tuh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic venues in Óbidos often position seating near windows or terraces to frame views of the medieval castle.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a leitora de cartões?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH lay-TOH-ruh DIH kuh-ruh-TOHNYSH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente ou ao gerente sobre a localização.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih OHW OW zheh-RAYNG-tih SOHB-rih AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the attendant or the manager about the location.

responses.english: Ask the attendant or the manager about the location.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih OHW OW zheh-RAYNG-tih SOHB-rih AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte ao atendente ou ao gerente sobre a localização.

phrases.text_local: Onde encontro um restaurante típico aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente, ele pode indicar um restaurante típico por perto.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih, EH-lih PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo POOR PEHR-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the attendant, they can recommend a typical restaurant nearby.

responses.english: Ask the attendant, they can recommend a typical restaurant nearby.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih, EH-lih PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo POOR PEHR-too.
responses.local: Pergunte ao atendente, ele pode indicar um restaurante típico por perto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle view is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a vista do castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH VEESH-tuh DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: A vista do castelo é apreciada do balcão de pedra da Ginjinha do Zé.

phrases.text_local: Onde estão os copos de chocolate?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH KOH-poosh DIH shoo-koo-LAH-tih?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente no balcão de pedra.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH PEHD-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the attendant at the stone counter.

responses.english: Ask the attendant at the stone counter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH PEHD-ruh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao atendente no balcão de pedra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tip jar is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a jarra de gorjetas?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee es-TAH ah ZHAH-rah jee gor-ZHEH-tahs
phrases.cultural_note: Tipping in Portuguese drink bars is usually voluntary and collected in a visible ceramic or glass jar.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão, junto à caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN, ZHOONNG-too AH KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the counter, next to the till.

responses.english: Good morning, at the counter, next to the till.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN, ZHOONNG-too AH KEYE-shuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no balcão, junto à caixa.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de pedra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH PEHD-ruh?

likely_response.local: O balcão de pedra é aqui mesmo, onde servimos a ginjinha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW bahl-KOWN DIH PEHD-ruh EH uh-KEE MEHZH-moo, OHNG-dih seh-ruh-VEE-moosh AH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The stone counter is right here, where we serve the ginjinha.

responses.english: The stone counter is right here, where we serve the ginjinha.
responses.phonetic: AW bahl-KOWN DIH PEHD-ruh EH uh-KEE MEHZH-moo, OHNG-dih seh-ruh-VEE-moosh AH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh.
responses.local: O balcão de pedra é aqui mesmo, onde servimos a ginjinha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the card reader is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a leitora de cartões aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH lay-TOH-ruh DIH kuh-ruh-TOHNYSH uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese counters often place card terminals near the payment zone for quick transaction processing.
